title: Essentials Fabric
description: Small touches to Minecraft for good quality
body: ![A text saying essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e549ac46b7317d06b4d7255178014f95861407a.png) The Essentials Modpack includes all the mods _(and resource packs)_ I believe provide essential quality-of-life features, such as zooming, replay recordings, voice chat, Controller support, performance optimizations, and more. I made this mod all by myself so I hope you like it :) ![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg) [ ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/essentials-modpacks) > # List of mods inside - 3d Skin layers - Appleskin - Boat Item View - Chat Heads - Cloth Config - Clumps - Controlify - Continuity - EMF - ETF - Entity Culling - Essential Mod - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - FerriteCore - Inventory Management - Iris Shaders - LibJF - Lithium - Sodium - Mod Menu - Placeholder API - Replay Mod - Replay Voice Chat - Simple Voice Chat - ResPackOpts - Resourcify - Shluker Box Tooltips - SuperMartijn642's Core Lib - Visuality - YetAnotherConfigLib > # List of resource packs inside - Bare bones - Fresh Animations - New Glowing Ores - Qrafty`s capitalized font - Immersive Interfaces
